race.comment: SPANISH ARTIST (8) heavily supported on debut with a sharp Super Maiden win as fav over 1200m at Kembla Grange in the soft (7) going. Nice filly who will be even better suited out to the 1400m. Tim Clark hops on and expected to go close in this stronger contest. UPWARDLY MOBILE (1) consistent Scone-trained mare who will find this more to her liking. Produced excellent figures late with a slashing third in the Northern Wild Card at Scone. Each way player with the 3kg claim. LITTLE IRIS (2) brings a solid SP profile and returns from a 40 day let-up. Faded in the straight when fifth to Aisle Two over 1500m here in BM72 class. Kept up to the mark with a 1000m trial and capable of testing these. RED RAGS TO BULLS (12) back in grade and struggling to draw a decent gate third-up. Total forgive from the wide barrier when twelfth over 1400m at Scone in the Northern Wild Card. Claim helps in a weaker contest at the good each way odds. The chances don't end there.
race.rail_position: 8m from 1000m to Winning post and 6m the remainder. (Pent: 5.55)
